response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with ~14 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but falls well short of the Principal/Director-level IC bar for an AI Strategy role. There is no evidence of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products/platforms at scale, advising strategic customers, or driving cross-organizational technical strategy. Background is primarily hands-on product engineering rather than executive-level technical leadership in cloud/AI.
strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Track record of founding open-source platforms and delivering public talks/workshops
concerns: No demonstrated Principal/Director-level IC scope or org-wide strategic influence
Lacks recognized AI expertise, advanced AI degree, or shipped AI products at scale
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners on cloud or AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Limited demonstrated AI expertise and shipped AI products
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure
